Class AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair

java.lang.Object
com.seq.acheron.secrets.asymmetric.AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
Direct Known Subclasses:
EcKeyPair, RsaKeyPair
public abstract class AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair extends Object
Abstract base class representing an asymmetric key pair, consisting of a public key and a private key.

Concrete subclasses (e.g. RSA, EC) provide the actual key generation and import logic for a specific algorithm.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair

      protected AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair(PublicKey publicKey, PrivateKey privateKey)
      Creates an AbstractKeyPair from existing key objects.
      Parameters:
      publicKey - the public key, must not be null
      privateKey - the private key, must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getAlgorithm

      public abstract String getAlgorithm()
      Returns the algorithm name (e.g. "RSA", "EC") for this key pair.
      Returns:
      the algorithm identifier

    • exportPublicKeyBase64

      public String exportPublicKeyBase64()
      Exports the public key to a Base64-encoded string.

      The binary format (e.g. X.509 / SubjectPublicKeyInfo) depends on the specific algorithm and provider implementation.

      Returns:
      the Base64 representation of the encoded public key

    • exportPrivateKeyBase64

      public String exportPrivateKeyBase64()
      Exports the private key to a Base64-encoded string.

      The binary format (e.g. PKCS#8) depends on the specific algorithm and provider implementation. Handle this value with great care.

      Returns:
      the Base64 representation of the encoded private key

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a non-sensitive, human-readable description of this key pair.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a short string describing algorithm and formats
